name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_blocker_report
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessBlockerReport decomposes live cruise skew-wake validation blockers into audit-only next actions.
note: Primary diagnostic report for live cruise skew-wake validation readiness.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessGate supplies powered-source skew-probe transient-probe target-coverage temporal-resolution and runtime-coupling readiness fields.
note: Upstream live-validation readiness gate.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTemporalResolution supplies fast-arrival sampling constraints and target-level transient probe flags.
note: Temporal substepping evidence source.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTransit supplies rotor-resolved cruise skew-wake pressure velocity arrival and momentum targets behind the readiness gate.
note: Wake transit target source.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeValidationRunMatrix consumes this readiness gate before any live transient skew-wake run can be treated as pending.
note: Downstream run-status consumer.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live powered-source local skew-wake and transient probe evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live cruise skew-wake validation.

name: cruise_skew_wake_readiness_blocker_report
value: Wait for powered-source local skew-wake and transient probe APIs then verify complete rotor-plane-sweep targets target-level transient probe backing strict fast-arrival substepping and closed runtime coupling before starting live cruise skew-wake validation.
note: Method keeps live cruise skew-wake validation evidence separate from gameplay coupling.
